framework_precondition.observed_failure: SpeechRecognizerWorker rejected Float32 AVAudioPCMBuffer input with the message that sample data must be 16-bit signed integers.
framework_precondition.boundary_decision: The C ABI remains caller-owned f32 PCM; the repository-owned Swift shim clamps and converts each copied chunk to Int16 before AnalyzerInput.
